slides.title: Governance & Security
slides.subtitle: Move fast without losing control — enterprise-grade platform governance
slides.notes: Source: kissflow.com governance section, community security docs

slides.title: Governance Module Overview
slides.notes: Overview slide — drill into each module in following slides.

slides.title: Data Policies
bullets: Centralize and secure all organizational data in one governed layer
Define data classification and handling rules
Real-time filters and views to structure information access
Control which apps and processes can access which data
Customizable permissions at data object level
Foundation for compliant data management across the platform

slides.title: App Monitoring
bullets: Monitor app performance and catch issues before they escalate
Track usage patterns — active users, page views, submissions
Identify underutilized apps for optimization or retirement
Detect anomalies in app behavior or data volume
Ensure business continuity with real-time monitoring dashboards
Export monitoring data for IT operations reporting

slides.title: User Monitoring
bullets: Track logins, actions, and behaviors across the platform
Detect suspicious activity and respond to security threats
Maintain visibility into access permissions and changes
Session tracking and concurrent login monitoring
Inactive user identification for license optimization
Compliance reporting on user access patterns

slides.title: Role-Based Access Control
bullets: Assign permissions based on roles to minimize security exposure
Hierarchical roles: Super Admin → App Admin → User
Custom roles per process, app, board, and dataform
Group-based role assignment for scalable management
Principle of least privilege — users access only what's necessary
Auditable access controls with change history

slides.title: Audit Log
bullets: Automatically log every action and change in the system
Timestamped records: who, what, when, and from where
Meet regulatory compliance requirements (SOX, HIPAA, GDPR)
Investigate incidents with searchable audit trail
Export audit logs for external compliance audits
Retention policies configurable for log data

slides.title: Authentication and API Security
bullets: SSO integration with SAML, OAuth, and OIDC providers
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) enforcement
Service accounts for secure API and integration access
Authentication keys management in Admin settings
API rate limiting and IP allowlisting
Session timeout and concurrent session policies
slides.notes: Source: community.kissflow.com > Authentication Keys, Service account

slides.title: Data Backup
bullets: Enterprise plan — available on request from support team
Account-level backup of processes, apps, and data
Understand backup output format for restore planning
Disaster recovery consideration for business continuity
Coordinate backup schedule with IT operations
Source: community.kissflow.com > Understanding your backup output
slides.notes: Enterprise customers should request backup enablement early.

slides.title: Compliance and Certifications
bullets: GDPR compliance for European data protection requirements
SOC 2 Type II certification for security controls
Data residency options for regulated industries
Responsible disclosure program for security researchers
End of Life (EoL) policy for deprecated features
Security page at kissflow.com/security for full details
slides.notes: Reference compliance docs for regulated industries.

slides.title: Citizen Development Governance
bullets: Establish a Center of Excellence (CoE) for citizen development
Define which teams can build vs only consume apps
App review and approval workflow before production publish
Naming conventions and documentation standards
Regular audits of apps, permissions, and data access
Balance empowerment with IT oversight for sustainable scaling
slides.notes: Critical for organizations scaling beyond pilot projects.

slides.title: Governance Best Practices
bullets: Enable governance modules from day one — not as an afterthought
Review audit logs and user monitoring monthly
Conduct quarterly access reviews — remove stale permissions
Document data classification for all production apps
Train citizen developers on security responsibilities
Maintain an app inventory with owners and business purpose
